title: ExpandedPrompt
description: Pre-processed prompt produced by the prompt_expander Stage 0. Adds architectural detail, style/size hints, and Alexander pattern keywords to a possibly-short user prompt. Fed to the retriever + main_agent as a richer description.

expanded_description.description: Rich paragraph (80-200 words) faithful to the user's intent + architectural detail.

implied_rooms.description: Room roles the user likely wants (e.g. kitchen, bedroom, hallway). Use snake_case from the catalog.

atmosphere.description: Mood / vibe in 2-6 words (e.g. 'cozy, lived-in, single-family').

alexander_intent_keywords.description: Pattern IDs from RAG-C most relevant to this prompt (e.g. intimacy-gradient, the-farmhouse-kitchen). Max 6.

constraints.description: Hard constraints the user wrote or strongly implied (e.g. 'height ≤ 2 floors', 'rustic materials only').
